title: <name> and the Case of the Missing Pencil Case

pages.text:
One bright morning in class, <name> reached for his pencil case — and it was gone!

“Where could it be?” he wondered, scanning the desk. He noticed a smudge of graphite on the floor leading toward the corridor. Curious, he followed it carefully.
He asked his friend Aanya to help. Together, they spotted a trail of colored pencils rolling slightly as if someone had hurried past. “Looks like a clue!” <name> whispered, grinning.

They tiptoed after the pencils, but suddenly one slipped away and rolled down the corridor! <name> darted after it, chasing it past the classroom doors and around the library corner. A playful giggle echoed — could someone be watching?

At the next clue, they found a small note tucked under the water fountain:

"Follow the colors, little detectives. – Your secret helper"

<name> laughed. “This is fun! We’re on a real mystery!” Aanya nodded, scanning the hallways for more hints.

Finally, the trail ended at the art room, where a fluffy class pet rabbit was hopping around happily, sitting on a pile of papers… and on top of them was <name>’s pencil case! It seemed the rabbit had nudged it out of the classroom earlier, thinking it was part of a game.

<name> carefully picked up the pencil case and gave the rabbit a gentle pat. “Ah, mystery solved!” he said. Aanya laughed, and the two returned to class together, pencils in hand.

<name> realized that observing clues, asking friends for help, and staying curious had made solving the puzzle exciting and easy. And sometimes, mysteries have funny, unexpected solutions — like a playful pet enjoying the adventure just as much as he did!
